projectDescription: A collection of small educational projects in C++ and Python covering matrix operations, AI search algorithms (BFS, DFS, heuristic), Sudoku solving, and classic recursive algorithms.
keyFeatures: 8-Puzzle solver with BFS, DFS, and heuristic (priority queue) search strategies
Sudoku solver using BFS and DFS with row, column, and 3x3 region validation
Matrix operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication) in Python with console menu
Gaussian elimination for solving systems of linear equations using NumPy
Recursive factorial implementation in both C++ and Python
Recursive Fibonacci sequence implementation in C++
publicApiSurface: puzzle::ingresarPuzzle(char mtz[3][3]) — static method to input a puzzle from keyboard
puzzle::imprimir() — display the 3x3 puzzle board
puzzle::evaluacion(puzzle h, puzzle m) — heuristic evaluation (misplaced tiles)
puzzle::mov_espacio_izquierda/derecha/arriba/abajo() — generate child states by moving the blank
problema_puzzles::Amplitud() — BFS search for 8-Puzzle
problema_puzzles::Profundidad() — DFS search for 8-Puzzle
problema_puzzles::Heuristica() — heuristic priority-queue search for 8-Puzzle
sudoku::verificarFila(char num, int fila) — check if number exists in a row
sudoku::verificarColumna(char num, int columna) — check if number exists in a column
sudoku::verificarRegion(char num, int region) — check if number exists in a 3x3 region
sudoku::verificarResolucion() — verify the Sudoku is fully and correctly solved
problemaSudoku::Amplitud() — BFS Sudoku solver
problemaSudoku::Profundidad() — DFS Sudoku solver
IngresarMatriz(T1, T2=None) — input a matrix from keyboard (Python)
MostrarMatriz(matriz) — print a matrix (Python)
SumarMatriz(matriz) — add a matrix to the result (Python)
RestarMatriz(matriz) — subtract a matrix from the result (Python)
MultiplicarMatriz(matriz, T1, T2) — multiply two matrices (Python)
factorial(n) — recursive factorial in C++ and Python
fibonacci(n) — recursive Fibonacci in C++
